action_mappings_indef.unassign_oncall_engineer: unassign an oncall engineer {} from a change incident case {} as the responder

predicate_mappings.assigned_responder: {} is the assigned responder for the case {}
predicate_mappings.responder_allocated: a responder is allocated to the case {}
predicate_mappings.mitigation_authorized: mitigation is authorized for the case {}
predicate_mappings.fix_scheduled: {} is scheduled to be fixed during {}
predicate_mappings.fix_authorized: a fix has been authorized for {}
predicate_mappings.execution_order_finalized: the execution order for {} is finalized
predicate_mappings.case_alias_primary_for_fix: {} is the primary case alias for the fix {}
predicate_mappings.fix_cross_case_authorized: the fix cross case {} is authorized for {}
predicate_mappings.case_alias_secondary_for_fix: {} is a secondary alias for the fix {}

open_case.description: open a change incident case A
preconditions: I can only open a change incident case A if it is not the case that the case A is active and it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I open a change incident case A, it is the case that the case A is active

assign_oncall_engineer.description: assign an oncall engineer B to a change incident case A as the responder
preconditions: I can only assign an oncall engineer B to a change incident case A as the responder if it is the case that the case A is active and B is available as an engineer and B is eligible for the case A
I can only assign an oncall engineer B to a change incident case A as the responder if it is not the case that a responder is allocated to the case A
effects: Once I assign an oncall engineer B to a change incident case A as the responder, it is the case that B is the assigned responder for the case A and a responder is allocated to the case A
Once I assign an oncall engineer B to a change incident case A as the responder, it is not the case anymore that B is available as an engineer

unassign_oncall_engineer.description: unassign an oncall engineer B from a change incident case A as the responder
preconditions: I can only unassign an oncall engineer B from a change incident case A as the responder if it is the case that B is the assigned responder for the case A
I can only unassign an oncall engineer B from a change incident case A as the responder if it is not the case that A is ready to be fixed and it is not the case that approval has been granted for A
effects: Once I unassign an oncall engineer B from a change incident case A as the responder, it is the case that B is available as an engineer

Once I unassign an oncall engineer B from a change incident case A as the responder, it is not the case anymore that B is the assigned responder for the case A and it is not the case anymore that a responder is allocated to the case A and it is not the case anymore that mitigation is authorized for the case A and it is not the case anymore that remediation is applied to A and it is not the case anymore that A requires escalation and it is not the case anymore that the execution order for A is finalized and it is not the case anymore that A requires additional review

bind_runbook_to_case.description: bind a runbook B to a change incident case A
preconditions: I can only bind a runbook B to a change incident case A if it is the case that the case A is active and B is an available runbook
effects: Once I bind a runbook B to a change incident case A, it is the case that B is bound to the case A
Once I bind a runbook B to a change incident case A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available runbook

unbind_runbook_from_case.description: unbind a runbook B from a change incident case A
preconditions: I can only unbind a runbook B from a change incident case A if it is the case that B is bound to the case A
effects: Once I unbind a runbook B from a change incident case A, it is the case that B is an available runbook
Once I unbind a runbook B from a change incident case A, it is not the case anymore that B is bound to the case A

authorize_runbook_execution.description: authorize execution of a runbook B for a change incident case A
preconditions: I can only authorize execution of a runbook B for a change incident case A if it is the case that the case A is active and a responder is allocated to the case A and B is bound to the case A
I can only authorize execution of a runbook B for a change incident case A if it is not the case that mitigation is authorized for the case A
effects: Once I authorize execution of a runbook B for a change incident case A, it is the case that mitigation is authorized for the case A

approve_mitigation.description: approve mitigation for a change incident case A by an approver person B
preconditions: I can only approve mitigation for a change incident case A by an approver person B if it is the case that the case A is active and a responder is allocated to the case A and B is an available approver
I can only approve mitigation for a change incident case A by an approver person B if it is not the case that mitigation is authorized for the case A
effects: Once I approve mitigation for a change incident case A by an approver person B, it is the case that mitigation is authorized for the case A and A requires escalation
Once I approve mitigation for a change incident case A by an approver person B, it is not the case anymore that B is an available approver

execute_runbook.description: execute a runbook B for a change incident case A by an executor operator C
preconditions: I can only execute a runbook B for a change incident case A by an executor operator C if it is the case that mitigation is authorized for the case A and a responder is allocated to the case A and B is bound to the case A and C is available as an executor
I can only execute a runbook B for a change incident case A by an executor operator C if it is not the case that remediation is applied to A
effects: Once I execute a runbook B for a change incident case A by an executor operator C, it is the case that remediation is applied to A
Once I execute a runbook B for a change incident case A by an executor operator C, it is not the case anymore that A requires escalation

apply_fix_artifact.description: apply a fix artifact B to a change incident case A
preconditions: I can only apply a fix artifact B to a change incident case A if it is the case that a responder is allocated to the case A and the fix cross case A is authorized for B
I can only apply a fix artifact B to a change incident case A if it is not the case that remediation is applied to A
effects: Once I apply a fix artifact B to a change incident case A, it is the case that remediation is applied to A
Once I apply a fix artifact B to a change incident case A, it is not the case anymore that A requires escalation

select_mitigation.description: select a workaround mitigation B for a change incident case A
preconditions: I can only select a workaround mitigation B for a change incident case A if it is the case that the case A is active and B is an available mitigation and B is applicable to the case A
effects: Once I select a workaround mitigation B for a change incident case A, it is the case that B is selected as mitigation for A
Once I select a workaround mitigation B for a change incident case A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available mitigation

deselect_mitigation.description: deselect a workaround mitigation B from a change incident case A
preconditions: I can only deselect a workaround mitigation B from a change incident case A if it is the case that B is selected as mitigation for A
effects: Once I deselect a workaround mitigation B from a change incident case A, it is the case that B is an available mitigation
Once I deselect a workaround mitigation B from a change incident case A, it is not the case anymore that B is selected as mitigation for A

reserve_component.description: reserve a system component B for a change incident case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a system component B for a change incident case A if it is the case that the case A is active and B is an available component and B is applicable to the case A
effects: Once I reserve a system component B for a change incident case A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a system component B for a change incident case A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available component

release_component_reservation.description: release reservation of a system component B for a change incident case A
preconditions: I can only release reservation of a system component B for a change incident case A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release reservation of a system component B for a change incident case A, it is the case that B is an available component
Once I release reservation of a system component B for a change incident case A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

reserve_operational_action.description: reserve an operational action B for a change incident case A
preconditions: I can only reserve an operational action B for a change incident case A if it is the case that the case A is active and B is an available operational action and B is applicable to the case A
effects: Once I reserve an operational action B for a change incident case A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve an operational action B for a change incident case A, it is not the case anymore that B is an available operational action

release_operational_action.description: release an operational action B from a change incident case A
preconditions: I can only release an operational action B from a change incident case A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release an operational action B from a change incident case A, it is the case that B is an available operational action
Once I release an operational action B from a change incident case A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

reserve_rollback_artifact.description: reserve a rollback artifact B for a change incident case A rollback
preconditions: I can only reserve a rollback artifact B for a change incident case A rollback if it is the case that the case A is active and B is available for rollback and B is applicable to the case A
effects: Once I reserve a rollback artifact B for a change incident case A rollback, it is the case that B is reserved for rollback of A
Once I reserve a rollback artifact B for a change incident case A rollback, it is not the case anymore that B is available for rollback

release_rollback_artifact.description: release a rollback artifact B from a change incident case A rollback reservation
preconditions: I can only release a rollback artifact B from a change incident case A rollback reservation if it is the case that B is reserved for rollback of A
effects: Once I release a rollback artifact B from a change incident case A rollback reservation, it is the case that B is available for rollback
Once I release a rollback artifact B from a change incident case A rollback reservation, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for rollback of A

propose_and_schedule_fix.description: propose and schedule a fix for a change incident case A using a workaround mitigation C on a system component D during a deployment window B
preconditions: I can only propose and schedule a fix for a change incident case A using a workaround mitigation C on a system component D during a deployment window B if it is the case that a responder is allocated to the case A and C is selected as mitigation for A and D is reserved for A and B is an available window and B is eligible for the case A

I can only propose and schedule a fix for a change incident case A using a workaround mitigation C on a system component D during a deployment window B if it is not the case that A is ready to be fixed
effects: Once I propose and schedule a fix for a change incident case A using a workaround mitigation C on a system component D during a deployment window B, it is the case that A is scheduled to be fixed during B and A is ready to be fixed

Once I propose and schedule a fix for a change incident case A using a workaround mitigation C on a system component D during a deployment window B, it is not the case anymore that B is an available window

propose_fix_with_operational_validation.description: propose a fix with operational validation for a change incident case A using an operational action C in a test environment D during a deployment window B
preconditions: I can only propose a fix with operational validation for a change incident case A using an operational action C in a test environment D during a deployment window B if it is the case that a responder is allocated to the case A and C is reserved for A and D is available for testing and B is an available window and B is eligible for the case A and D is applicable to the case A

I can only propose a fix with operational validation for a change incident case A using an operational action C in a test environment D during a deployment window B if it is not the case that A is ready to be fixed
effects: Once I propose a fix with operational validation for a change incident case A using an operational action C in a test environment D during a deployment window B, it is the case that A is scheduled to be fixed during B and A is ready to be fixed and A requires additional review and A requires escalation

Once I propose a fix with operational validation for a change incident case A using an operational action C in a test environment D during a deployment window B, it is not the case anymore that B is an available window and it is not the case anymore that D is available for testing

clear_risk_and_escalation.description: clear risk and escalation for a change incident case A using a workaround mitigation B on a system component C
preconditions: I can only clear risk and escalation for a change incident case A using a workaround mitigation B on a system component C if it is the case that A is ready to be fixed and A requires additional review and B is selected as mitigation for A and C is reserved for A
effects: Once I clear risk and escalation for a change incident case A using a workaround mitigation B on a system component C, it is not the case anymore that A requires additional review and it is not the case anymore that A requires escalation

grant_approval_channel.description: grant approval through an approval channel D for a change incident case A using a workaround mitigation B on a system component C
preconditions: I can only grant approval through an approval channel D for a change incident case A using a workaround mitigation B on a system component C if it is the case that remediation is applied to A and A is ready to be fixed and B is selected as mitigation for A and C is reserved for A and A has a stakeholder channel D

I can only grant approval through an approval channel D for a change incident case A using a workaround mitigation B on a system component C if it is not the case that A requires escalation and it is not the case that approval has been granted for A
effects: Once I grant approval through an approval channel D for a change incident case A using a workaround mitigation B on a system component C, it is the case that approval has been granted for A

grant_escalated_approval.description: grant escalated approval through an escalation channel D for a change incident case A using an operational action B with a rollback artifact C
preconditions: I can only grant escalated approval through an escalation channel D for a change incident case A using an operational action B with a rollback artifact C if it is the case that remediation is applied to A and A is ready to be fixed and B is reserved for A and C is reserved for rollback of A and A has a stakeholder channel D

I can only grant escalated approval through an escalation channel D for a change incident case A using an operational action B with a rollback artifact C if it is not the case that approval has been granted for A
effects: Once I grant escalated approval through an escalation channel D for a change incident case A using an operational action B with a rollback artifact C, it is the case that approval has been granted for A and A requires escalation

finalize_execution_sequence.description: finalize execution sequence for a change incident case A using a workaround mitigation B on a system component C
preconditions: I can only finalize execution sequence for a change incident case A using a workaround mitigation B on a system component C if it is the case that approval has been granted for A and A requires escalation and B is selected as mitigation for A and C is reserved for A
effects: Once I finalize execution sequence for a change incident case A using a workaround mitigation B on a system component C, it is the case that the execution order for A is finalized

Once I finalize execution sequence for a change incident case A using a workaround mitigation B on a system component C, it is not the case anymore that A requires escalation and it is not the case anymore that remediation is applied to A and it is not the case anymore that A requires additional review

execute_runbook_post_sequence.description: execute runbook a runbook B for a change incident case A with an executor operator C
preconditions: I can only execute runbook a runbook B for a change incident case A with an executor operator C if it is the case that the execution order for A is finalized and approval has been granted for A and a responder is allocated to the case A and B is bound to the case A and C is available as an executor
I can only execute runbook a runbook B for a change incident case A with an executor operator C if it is not the case that remediation is applied to A
effects: Once I execute runbook a runbook B for a change incident case A with an executor operator C, it is the case that remediation is applied to A

authorize_fix_via_runbook.description: authorize fix for a change incident case A via a runbook B
preconditions: I can only authorize fix for a change incident case A via a runbook B if it is the case that approval has been granted for A and remediation is applied to A and B is bound to the case A
I can only authorize fix for a change incident case A via a runbook B if it is not the case that A requires escalation and it is not the case that a fix has been authorized for A
effects: Once I authorize fix for a change incident case A via a runbook B, it is the case that a fix has been authorized for A

authorize_via_personal_approver.description: authorize fix for a change incident case A via an approver person B
preconditions: I can only authorize fix for a change incident case A via an approver person B if it is the case that approval has been granted for A and remediation is applied to A and B is an available approver
I can only authorize fix for a change incident case A via an approver person B if it is not the case that A requires escalation and it is not the case that a fix has been authorized for A
effects: Once I authorize fix for a change incident case A via an approver person B, it is the case that a fix has been authorized for A
Once I authorize fix for a change incident case A via an approver person B, it is not the case anymore that B is an available approver

bind_fix_to_case.description: bind a fix artifact B to a change incident case A
preconditions: I can only bind a fix artifact B to a change incident case A if it is the case that a fix has been authorized for A and B is available for fixing and A is a secondary alias for the fix B
effects: Once I bind a fix artifact B to a change incident case A, it is the case that B is bound to the case A
Once I bind a fix artifact B to a change incident case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available for fixing

perform_cross_case_authorization.description: perform cross case authorization for a fix artifact C from a case alias primary B to a case alias secondary A
preconditions: I can only perform cross case authorization for a fix artifact C from a case alias primary B to a case alias secondary A if it is the case that the case A is active and A requires cross case authorization and A is the primary case alias for the fix C and C is bound to the case B
I can only perform cross case authorization for a fix artifact C from a case alias primary B to a case alias secondary A if it is not the case that the fix cross case A is authorized for C
effects: Once I perform cross case authorization for a fix artifact C from a case alias primary B to a case alias secondary A, it is the case that the fix cross case A is authorized for C

record_validation_completion.description: record validation completion for a change incident case A using a runbook B by an executor operator C
preconditions: I can only record validation completion for a change incident case A using a runbook B by an executor operator C if it is the case that the case A is active and A requires cross case authorization and remediation is applied to A and a fix has been authorized for A and B is bound to the case A and C is available as an executor
I can only record validation completion for a change incident case A using a runbook B by an executor operator C if it is not the case that validation is completed for A
effects: Once I record validation completion for a change incident case A using a runbook B by an executor operator C, it is the case that validation is completed for A

close_case_with_dual_auth.description: close a change incident case A with dual authorization
preconditions: I can only close a change incident case A with dual authorization if it is the case that A requires dual authorization and the case A is active and a responder is allocated to the case A and A is ready to be fixed and approval has been granted for A and a fix has been authorized for A and remediation is applied to A
I can only close a change incident case A with dual authorization if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close a change incident case A with dual authorization, it is the case that A is closed

close_case_with_cross_auth.description: close a change incident case A with cross case authorization using a fix artifact B
preconditions: I can only close a change incident case A with cross case authorization using a fix artifact B if it is the case that A requires cross case authorization and the case A is active and a responder is allocated to the case A and A is ready to be fixed and approval has been granted for A and a fix has been authorized for A and remediation is applied to A and the fix cross case A is authorized for B
I can only close a change incident case A with cross case authorization using a fix artifact B if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close a change incident case A with cross case authorization using a fix artifact B, it is the case that A is closed

close_case_after_validation.description: close a change incident case A after validation completion
preconditions: I can only close a change incident case A after validation completion if it is the case that A requires cross case authorization and the case A is active and a responder is allocated to the case A and A is ready to be fixed and approval has been granted for A and a fix has been authorized for A and remediation is applied to A and validation is completed for A
I can only close a change incident case A after validation completion if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close a change incident case A after validation completion, it is the case that A is closed

action_nl_templates.assign_oncall_engineer: assign oncall engineer {?oncall_engineer} to change incident case {?change_incident_case} as the responder
action_nl_templates.unassign_oncall_engineer: unassign oncall engineer {?oncall_engineer} from change incident case {?change_incident_case} as the responder
action_nl_templates.bind_runbook_to_case: bind runbook {?runbook} to change incident case {?change_incident_case}
action_nl_templates.unbind_runbook_from_case: unbind runbook {?runbook} from change incident case {?change_incident_case}
action_nl_templates.authorize_runbook_execution: authorize execution of runbook {?runbook} for change incident case {?change_incident_case}
action_nl_templates.approve_mitigation: approve mitigation for change incident case {?change_incident_case} by approver person {?approver_person}
action_nl_templates.execute_runbook: execute runbook {?runbook} for change incident case {?change_incident_case} by executor operator {?executor_operator}
action_nl_templates.apply_fix_artifact: apply fix artifact {?fix_artifact} to change incident case {?change_incident_case}
action_nl_templates.select_mitigation: select workaround mitigation {?workaround_mitigation} for change incident case {?change_incident_case}
action_nl_templates.deselect_mitigation: deselect workaround mitigation {?workaround_mitigation} from change incident case {?change_incident_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_component: reserve system component {?system_component} for change incident case {?change_incident_case}
action_nl_templates.release_component_reservation: release reservation of system component {?system_component} for change incident case {?change_incident_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_operational_action: reserve operational action {?operational_action} for change incident case {?change_incident_case}
action_nl_templates.release_operational_action: release operational action {?operational_action} from change incident case {?change_incident_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_rollback_artifact: reserve rollback artifact {?rollback_artifact} for change incident case {?change_incident_case} rollback
action_nl_templates.release_rollback_artifact: release rollback artifact {?rollback_artifact} from change incident case {?change_incident_case} rollback reservation
action_nl_templates.propose_and_schedule_fix: propose and schedule a fix for change incident case {?change_incident_case} using workaround mitigation {?workaround_mitigation} on system component {?system_component} during deployment window {?deployment_window}
action_nl_templates.propose_fix_with_operational_validation: propose a fix with operational validation for change incident case {?change_incident_case} using operational action {?operational_action} in test environment {?test_environment} during deployment window {?deployment_window}
action_nl_templates.clear_risk_and_escalation: clear risk and escalation for change incident case {?change_incident_case} using workaround mitigation {?workaround_mitigation} on system component {?system_component}
action_nl_templates.grant_approval_channel: grant approval through approval channel {?approval_channel} for change incident case {?change_incident_case} using workaround mitigation {?workaround_mitigation} on system component {?system_component}
action_nl_templates.grant_escalated_approval: grant escalated approval through escalation channel {?escalation_channel} for change incident case {?change_incident_case} using operational action {?operational_action} with rollback artifact {?rollback_artifact}
action_nl_templates.finalize_execution_sequence: finalize execution sequence for change incident case {?change_incident_case} using workaround mitigation {?workaround_mitigation} on system component {?system_component}
action_nl_templates.execute_runbook_post_sequence: execute runbook runbook {?runbook} for change incident case {?change_incident_case} with executor operator {?executor_operator}
action_nl_templates.authorize_fix_via_runbook: authorize fix for change incident case {?change_incident_case} via runbook {?runbook}
action_nl_templates.authorize_via_personal_approver: authorize fix for change incident case {?change_incident_case} via approver person {?approver_person}
action_nl_templates.bind_fix_to_case: bind fix artifact {?fix_artifact} to change incident case {?change_incident_case}
action_nl_templates.perform_cross_case_authorization: perform cross-case authorization for fix artifact {?fix_artifact} from case alias primary {?case_alias_primary} to case alias secondary {?case_alias_secondary}
action_nl_templates.record_validation_completion: record validation completion for change incident case {?change_incident_case} using runbook {?runbook} by executor operator {?executor_operator}
action_nl_templates.close_case_with_dual_auth: close change incident case {?change_incident_case} with dual authorization
action_nl_templates.close_case_with_cross_auth: close change incident case {?change_incident_case} with cross-case authorization using fix artifact {?fix_artifact}
action_nl_templates.close_case_after_validation: close change incident case {?change_incident_case} after validation completion

predicate_nl_templates.assigned_responder: {?oncall_engineer} is the assigned responder for the case {?change_incident_case}
predicate_nl_templates.responder_allocated: a responder is allocated to the case {?change_incident_case}
predicate_nl_templates.mitigation_authorized: mitigation is authorized for the case {?change_incident_case}
predicate_nl_templates.fix_scheduled: {?change_incident_case} is scheduled to be fixed during {?deployment_window}
predicate_nl_templates.fix_authorized: a fix has been authorized for {?change_incident_case}
predicate_nl_templates.execution_order_finalized: the execution order for {?change_incident_case} is finalized
predicate_nl_templates.case_alias_primary_for_fix: {?change_incident_case} is the primary case alias for the fix {?fix_artifact}
predicate_nl_templates.fix_cross_case_authorized: the fix cross case {?change_incident_case} is authorized for {?fix_artifact}
predicate_nl_templates.case_alias_secondary_for_fix: {?change_incident_case} is a secondary alias for the fix {?fix_artifact}

action_nl_templates_indef.assign_oncall_engineer: assign an oncall engineer {?oncall_engineer} to a change incident case {?change_incident_case} as the responder
action_nl_templates_indef.unassign_oncall_engineer: unassign an oncall engineer {?oncall_engineer} from a change incident case {?change_incident_case} as the responder
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_runbook_to_case: bind a runbook {?runbook} to a change incident case {?change_incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.unbind_runbook_from_case: unbind a runbook {?runbook} from a change incident case {?change_incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.authorize_runbook_execution: authorize execution of a runbook {?runbook} for a change incident case {?change_incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.approve_mitigation: approve mitigation for a change incident case {?change_incident_case} by an approver person {?approver_person}
action_nl_templates_indef.execute_runbook: execute a runbook {?runbook} for a change incident case {?change_incident_case} by an executor operator {?executor_operator}
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_fix_artifact: apply a fix artifact {?fix_artifact} to a change incident case {?change_incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.select_mitigation: select a workaround mitigation {?workaround_mitigation} for a change incident case {?change_incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.deselect_mitigation: deselect a workaround mitigation {?workaround_mitigation} from a change incident case {?change_incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_component: reserve a system component {?system_component} for a change incident case {?change_incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_component_reservation: release reservation of a system component {?system_component} for a change incident case {?change_incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_operational_action: reserve an operational action {?operational_action} for a change incident case {?change_incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_operational_action: release an operational action {?operational_action} from a change incident case {?change_incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_rollback_artifact: reserve a rollback artifact {?rollback_artifact} for a change incident case {?change_incident_case} rollback
action_nl_templates_indef.release_rollback_artifact: release a rollback artifact {?rollback_artifact} from a change incident case {?change_incident_case} rollback reservation
action_nl_templates_indef.propose_and_schedule_fix: propose and schedule a fix for a change incident case {?change_incident_case} using a workaround mitigation {?workaround_mitigation} on a system component {?system_component} during a deployment window {?deployment_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.propose_fix_with_operational_validation: propose a fix with operational validation for a change incident case {?change_incident_case} using an operational action {?operational_action} in a test environment {?test_environment} during a deployment window {?deployment_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.clear_risk_and_escalation: clear risk and escalation for a change incident case {?change_incident_case} using a workaround mitigation {?workaround_mitigation} on a system component {?system_component}
action_nl_templates_indef.grant_approval_channel: grant approval through an approval channel {?approval_channel} for a change incident case {?change_incident_case} using a workaround mitigation {?workaround_mitigation} on a system component {?system_component}
action_nl_templates_indef.grant_escalated_approval: grant escalated approval through an escalation channel {?escalation_channel} for a change incident case {?change_incident_case} using an operational action {?operational_action} with a rollback artifact {?rollback_artifact}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_execution_sequence: finalize execution sequence for a change incident case {?change_incident_case} using a workaround mitigation {?workaround_mitigation} on a system component {?system_component}
action_nl_templates_indef.execute_runbook_post_sequence: execute runbook a runbook {?runbook} for a change incident case {?change_incident_case} with an executor operator {?executor_operator}
action_nl_templates_indef.authorize_fix_via_runbook: authorize fix for a change incident case {?change_incident_case} via a runbook {?runbook}
action_nl_templates_indef.authorize_via_personal_approver: authorize fix for a change incident case {?change_incident_case} via an approver person {?approver_person}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_fix_to_case: bind a fix artifact {?fix_artifact} to a change incident case {?change_incident_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.perform_cross_case_authorization: perform cross-case authorization for a fix artifact {?fix_artifact} from a case alias primary {?case_alias_primary} to a case alias secondary {?case_alias_secondary}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_validation_completion: record validation completion for a change incident case {?change_incident_case} using a runbook {?runbook} by an executor operator {?executor_operator}
action_nl_templates_indef.close_case_with_dual_auth: close a change incident case {?change_incident_case} with dual authorization
action_nl_templates_indef.close_case_with_cross_auth: close a change incident case {?change_incident_case} with cross-case authorization using a fix artifact {?fix_artifact}
action_nl_templates_indef.close_case_after_validation: close a change incident case {?change_incident_case} after validation completion

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a change incident case or a oncall engineer or a deployment window or a system component or a workaround mitigation or a operational action or a runbook or a approver person or a fix artifact or a executor operator or a test environment or a rollback artifact or a stakeholder group is also a object
Everything that is a approval channel or a escalation channel is also a stakeholder group
Everything that is a case alias primary or a case alias secondary is also a change incident case
